ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd. announced the allotment of 1,87,750 equity shares at Re. 1/- face value and an exercise price of Rs. 43/- per share to employees under its ESOP 2019, increasing its total paid-up share capital by approximately 0.18%. This routine issuance provides a minor cash inflow and serves primarily as an employee incentive and retention tool. No material financial impacts or red flags are evident, as it represents a standard employee benefit transaction in compliance with SEBI regulations.
